holdings.infoBox: TILC is an equity ETF with a total of 313 individual holdings. The top holdings are MSCI EAFE Index Future June 26 stock at 4.83%, ASML Holding at 3.02%, Novartis AG at 2.46%, ABB Ltd at 2.04%, and Allianz SE at 1.99%.

overview.description: The Thrivent International Large Cap ETF (TILC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed, large-cap focused, equity ETF. Stocks are selected from developed markets outside of the US using a multi-factor model TILC was launched on Jun 15, 2026 and is issued by Thrivent.
